## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest --cov` passes; new behavior has tests
- [ ] No secrets in code, logs, or fixtures; no emojis or em dashes in text
- [ ] Docs updated (module doc under `docs/modules/`, and `docs/architecture/` if a design decision changed)
- [ ] If prompts or output schemas changed, cassettes re-recorded
